texto: Adolescents need tremendous support as they go about the task of figuring out their identities, their future selves. Too often what they get is intrusion. Intrusion and support are two fundamentally different processes: support is about the needs of the child, intrusion is about the needs of the parent.
explicacao: Citação de Madelibe Levine sobre temas ligados a familia. “Adolescents need tremendous support as they go about the task of figuring out their identities, t…” articula familia, parenting, privilege em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como termino e privilege.
